value.body:
In the desktop create issue dialog, changing the selected repository clears `project`, `labels`, and `template`, but leaves `assignee` unchanged. If a user selects an assignee from repository A, switches to repository B, and submits the issue, the stale assignee is still sent in `createIssue.mutate`.

Evidence:
- `selectCreateIssueRepository` does not clear assignee: `packages/desktop/src/renderer/screens/WorkspaceScreen.tsx:919`
- Submit still sends `createIssueForm.values.assignee`: `packages/desktop/src/renderer/screens/WorkspaceScreen.tsx:976`

Expected behavior:
Switching repositories should clear any repository-scoped selections, including assignee, so the submitted issue only contains valid metadata for the chosen repository.

Acceptance criteria:
- Repository change resets `assignee` to `null`.
- Existing resets for project, labels, and template remain intact.
- Add or update a focused test covering repository switch behavior before manual issue creation.

frontmatter.title: Clear repository-scoped assignee when switching repositories in create issue dialog

value.title: Clear repository-scoped assignee when switching repositories in create issue dialog
